_source: Five Parsecs From Home: Planetfall p.52
_description: D100 Expedition Type table — rolled during Campaign Setup to determine colony purpose

entries.description: Your task is to develop a colony that will be usable as a research station in the future.
entries.effect: You begin the campaign with 3 Research Points.

entries.description: Unity Corporations have an interest in developing colonies for resource extraction and often fund missions of their own.
entries.effect: Your initial campaign map begins with 2 additional Investigation Sites.

entries.description: All is proceeding according to the directives of the Bureaucracy.
entries.effect: You begin the campaign with 3 units of Raw Materials.

entries.description: Unity approves a number of independent missions with the goal of later incorporating them into Unity proper.
entries.effect: You begin the campaign with 1 additional Story Point.

entries.description: You are paving the way for a future military outpost.
entries.effect: You begin the game with 2 additional grunts on your roster.

entries.description: The colony will be built around a philosophical principle or belief system.
entries.effect: You begin the campaign with 5 Morale points.
